zh.Aubigny, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯奧比尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gérard de Gournay於大約1065年出生時，他的父親Hugh II de Gournay36歲，母親Basilia de Fleitel43歲。他於1091年之前與Edith de Warenne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1104年之後在巴勒斯坦，埋葬在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦يطا。

zh-hans.Aubigny, Normandy, France: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯奧比尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gérard de Gournay于大约1065年出生时，他的父亲Hugh II de Gournay36岁，母亲Basilia de Fleitel43岁。他于1091年之前与Edith de Warenne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1104年之后在巴勒斯坦，埋葬在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦يطا。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gournay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gourley  .

variants.name: Gourley
meanings: Scottish: possibly a Norman habitational name from North or South Gorley (Hampshire), or an unidentified place in Normandy, France.

nameMeanings.name: Gérard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gérard de Gournay was born about 1065, his father, Hugh II de Gournay, was 36 and his mother, Basilia de Fleitel, was 43. He married Edith de Warenne before 1091. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1104, in Palestine, and was buried in Yaţţah, West Bank, Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gérard de Gournay est né environ 1065, son père, Hugh II de Gournay, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Basilia de Fleitel, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Edith de Warenne avant 1091. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1104, à Palestine, et a été enterré à Yaţţah, Cisjordanie, Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gérard de Gournay um 1065 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh II de Gournay 36 und seine Mutter Basilia de Fleitel 43. Er hat vor 1091 Edith de Warenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1104 in Palästina und wurde in Yaţţah, Westjordanland, Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard de Gournay è nato il circa 1065, il suo padre, Hugh II de Gournay, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Basilia de Fleitel, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Edith de Warenne prima del 1091. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1104, nel Palestina, e fu sepolto a Yaţţah, Cisgiordania, Palestina.

ja.lifeSummary: Gérard de Gournayが約1065年に生まれた時，父Hugh II de Gournayは36歳，母Basilia de Fleitelは43歳であった。1091年以前にEdith de Warenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1104年以後にパレスチナで死去し，パレスチナヨルダン川西岸地区يطاにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gérard de Gournay(이)가 대략 1065년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh II de Gournay(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilia de Fleitel(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1091년 이전 Edith de Warenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1104년 이후 팔레스타인에서 사망했으며 팔레스타인 팔레스타인 يطا에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard de Gournay nasceu aproximadamente 1065, seu pai, Hugh II de Gournay, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Basilia de Fleitel, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith de Warenne antes 1091. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1104, em Palestina, e foi sepultado em Yaţţah, Cisjordânia, Palestina.

ru.Yahūdhā, Palestine, Kingdom of Jerusalem: يطا, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gérard de Gournay родился около 1065 г., его отцу по имени Hugh II de Gournay было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilia de Fleitel, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith de Warenne перед 1091 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1104 г. в местности Палестина и был похоронен в местности يطا, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина.

sm.about 1065–after 1104: e tusa o le 1065–ina ua ma'ea le 1104

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gérard de Gournay nació aproximadamente 1065, su papá, Hugh II de Gournay, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Basilia de Fleitel, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Edith de Warenne antes de 1091. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1104, en Palestina, y fue sepultado en Yaţţah, Cisjordania, Palestina.
